name: Olive Garden House Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the garlic to the bottle of dressing.
2. Measure out 1/2 teaspoon dried basil and add it to the bottle.
3. Measure out 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano and add it to the bottle.
4. Open three packets of Sweet 'n' Low (or 1 tablespoon sugar) and add them to the bottle.
5. Secure the lid and shake well to combine all ingredients.
6. Place the bottle in the refrigerator for at least 24 hours before using.
